stats.emptyState: Starting to track this product. Check back in 24h for history.

reasons.priceHigherThanMax: The claimed "original" price ({originalPrice}) is {percentage}% higher than the highest price we've observed ({maxPrice}) across {observations} observations ({days} days of tracking) — the discount may be misleading.
reasons.priceHigherThanAverage: The "original" price is {percentage}% above the average price for the period.
reasons.priceHigherThan30DayLow: Current price ({currentPrice}) is {percentage}% above the lowest price in the last 30 days ({minPrice}) based on {observations} observations.
reasons.priceRecentlyIncreased: The price was raised shortly before the announced discount.
reasons.legitimateDiscount: The discount matches historical price patterns.
reasons.belowAverage: Current price ({currentPrice}) is {percentage}% below the average ({avgPrice}) across {observations} observations ({days} days of tracking).
reasons.atAllTimeLow: Current price ({currentPrice}) is at or near the lowest we've observed ({minPrice}) across {observations} observations ({days} days of tracking) — a genuinely good offer.
reasons.stablePrice: Price has remained stable through the last 30 days based on {observations} observations.
reasons.volatilePrice: Price has varied by {percentage}% across {observations} observations ({days} days of tracking) — it may be worth waiting for a better offer.
reasons.insufficientData: At least {needed} days of history needed for a reliable verdict ({current}/{needed} available so far).
